_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of strategies and tools for target research.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.540), LS-K-008 (LS, cosine: 0.511).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [research]. DCWF-only terms [knowledge, strategies, target, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.881, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 14 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of strategies and tools for target research." and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.559 > STS 0.428 (gap +0.131). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [research] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [research]. DCWF-only: [knowledge, strategies, target, tools]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].

signals.detail: STS 0.428 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.131 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
